description_long: This bungalow features a modern, minimalist design with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The exterior is primarily composed of smooth, dark and light wall panels, with large glass doors and windows providing ample natural light. The front facade includes a recessed entryway and a sheltered patio area, while the rear and sides are more enclosed with fewer openings. The structure sits on a raised platform, bordered by low perimeter walls that define a private outdoor space. The roof is flat with subtle vent details, and the overall form is rectangular with a strong horizontal emphasis. The building appears to be constructed from concrete, glass, and metal, typical of contemporary urban residential architecture.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with clean lines, large windows, and a mix of dark and light exterior panels, set on a raised platform with defined outdoor space.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass doors, and a sheltered patio area.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the solid wall sections and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Back view with additional glass doors and windows, and a more enclosed appearance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the flat roof details and limited window placement.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
